raw_text: javier arévalo casas date of birth: 12/04/1989 address: c/henares n28, valdetorres del jarama, madrid cp 28150 contact phone: +34699765322 email: javier.arevalo890 gmail.com education - 09/2007 - 09/2012 technical aeronautical engineering, specialized in aero-engines from escuela universitaria de ingeniería técnica aeronáutica, universidad politécnica de madrid. average grade: 7,2 on a scale of o to 10 - 09/2011 - 07/2012 erasmus exchange in rwth aachen where wrote my final project titled modeling and investigation of influence of airframe noise on overall aircraft noise for approach and departure procedures - 09/2010 - 08/2011 member of the upm racing team, participant in formula student germany, engine division - 09/2005 - 06/2007 technological baccalaureate, divina pastora (madrid) languages - spanish, native. - english, b2 - german, b1 - french, a2 professional experience - 03/2012 - 07/2012 - 2009 - 2010 - 07/2007 student assistant in shock wave laboratory in rwth aachen university, part-time job - developed a program with c++ to compute quasi- onedimensional nozzle flow for different gases. marshall at jarama circuit, madrid red-bull x-fighters, madrid informatics skills -microsoft office -catia v5: part design, assembly design and drafting -programming language: c++ others - driving license
